allow: Bash(node -e "const q = JSON.parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('questions.json','utf-8'\)\); const diffs = Object.keys\(q\); console.log\('Difficulties:', diffs\); diffs.forEach\(d => { const cats = Object.keys\(q[d]\); console.log\(d + ':', cats.map\(c => c + '=' + q[d][c].length\).join\(', '\)\); }\);")
